title: Amazon Drops a Fresh 10% Discount on Nintendo eShop Gift Cards Ready for Prime Day 2026
description: Amazon has dropped the price of the $10 Nintendo eShop gift card down to $8.98, allowing you to save 10% on it - just in time for Prime Day 2026.

title: Woot Is Selling the Nintendo Switch 2 From $399 Ahead of Scheduled September Price Hike
description: Woot's offering a deal on a new Nintendo Switch 2 console for just $399 if you’re a new customer to the online retailer and use a special code at checkout.

title: Dbrand Is Now Taking Orders for Its Steam Machine Companion Cube Case, Ships in "Late July"
description: Dbrand is now officially selling its Portal-themed Companion Cube case for Valve's yet unreleased Steam Machine, shipping in "Late July".
